summary: Decent audience recording that captures a brief Little Dog tuning moment; the performance itself receives no strong praise or criticism.
review: The reviewer prefers this audience tape over other available recordings, noting that the mix is clear enough to hear Jerry Garcia and Brent Mydland doing a Little Dog tuning between “Minglewood Blues” and “Brown‑Eyed Women.” No specific comments are made about the musical quality of the show beyond that incidental detail.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one neutral, three‑star review; it mentions acceptable audience sound and a small performance quirk but offers no clear praise or criticism of the music.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear enough to capture ambient details such as a 20‑second Little Dog tuning between songs; no major flaws reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or pacing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Caught doing a Little Dog tuning between Minglewood and Brown‑Eyed Women.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland heard doing a Little Dog tuning between songs.
